accounts.name: Accounts Payable
accounts.description: Moneys you owe to vendors and suppliers

accounts.name: Due to Owner
accounts.description: Short Term Loan from Owner - No Note or Bond

accounts.name: Loan - Furniture/Office Equip
accounts.description: Loan for purchase of furniture and office equipment

accounts.name: Opening Bal Equity
accounts.description: Offset account for use during the setup of the company's QuickBooks data file only.

accounts.name: Cost of Goods Sold
accounts.description: QuickBooks Automatically Increases the balance in this account when you use inventory items on invoices or sales receipts.
